title: Edit High-Impact Marketing Videos - 14/07/2026 22:21 EDT
desc:
I have a series of raw clips that need to be transformed into polished, attention-grabbing marketing videos. The finished pieces should feel sharp and modern—quick pacing, clean cuts, tasteful transitions, clear text overlays, and music that enhances the message without overpowering it. I’m supplying all footage, logos, and copy; you bring the creative eye and technical finesse.

Typical tasks will include trimming and sequencing, colour and audio correction, motion graphics for on-screen text or calls-to-action, and exporting in the common ad-friendly aspect ratios (16:9, 1:1, 9:16). If you work in Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve, great—just make sure the final files are compatible for easy revisions.

Deliverables
• One master edit (16:9) ready for web use  
• Two social cut-downs (1:1 and 9:16)  
• Project files and any custom graphics used  

Acceptance criteria
• Smooth pacing that holds viewer interest through the first 5 seconds  
• Clear branding visible throughout or in the end card  
• Final exports free of audio peaks or noticeable colour shifts  

Turnaround on the first draft is a week from receiving the footage, with two revision rounds included. If this first project goes well, I’ll have a steady flow of additional marketing edits ready to roll.

title: Logistics & Fleet Partnership for AU/NZ AI
desc:
Project Overview:
We are establishing compliance testing partnerships with premium logistics enterprises and freight networks in Australia and New Zealand to advance our AI fleet management models.
  
What We Need:
Target Group: Logistics companies or fleet managers capable of coordinating 30+ professional drivers with valid AU/NZ driving qualifications.  
Task: Drivers will complete a brief, 2-minute "AI Driver Model Layout Compatibility Verification" via their smartphones during off-peak hours (zero impact on daily shifts).  

Privacy & Security:
Fully compliant with the Privacy Act. The process strictly analyzes foundational layout compatibility. All sensitive data and faces undergo immediate, automated masking and blurring.  

Partnership & Compensation:
If your company can provide the required fleet organization and coordination services, the specific project models and compensation details will be further discussed in detail.

title: E-commerce Records & Inventory Setup
desc:
We are seeking detail-oriented freelancers to support our e-commerce business operations by maintaining accurate inventory records, updating business documents, and managing day-to-day operational data.

The project primarily focuses on organizing product information, updating inventory movement, maintaining sales records, and ensuring business data remains accurate and well-structured using Microsoft Excel and Microsoft Word.

Project Responsibilities:
• Maintain and update inventory records
• Record incoming and outgoing stock
• Update sales and product information
• Prepare and organize Microsoft Excel spreadsheets
• Maintain Microsoft Word documents and reports
• Verify data accuracy and perform quality checks
• Organize business records and digital documentation
• Support routine administrative and operational tasks

Requirements:
• Good knowledge of Microsoft Excel and Microsoft Word
• Basic computer skills and internet access
• Strong attention to detail
• Good typing accuracy
• Ability to understand instructions and meet deadlines
• Freshers and experienced freelancers are welcome

What We Offer:
• Multiple business-related assignments throughout the year
• Flexible work opportunities based on project requirements
• Clear project guidelines and task instructions
• Long-term collaboration opportunities for reliable freelancers
• Professional support throughout the project

If you are interested, please submit your proposal with a brief introduction, your experience lev

title: Health & Wellness Recruiter (Freelance, Remote)
desc:
# Healthcare Recruitment Partner (Remote | Freelance)

## About StrongBodyAI

StrongBodyAI is a global AI-powered platform connecting healthcare and wellness professionals with international digital opportunities. We are looking for Freelance Healthcare Recruitment Partners to help grow our professional community in Turkey.

## Responsibilities

* Recruit healthcare and wellness professionals, including physicians, dietitians, nutritionists, therapists, fitness trainers, yoga instructors, and skincare specialists.
* Source candidates through LinkedIn, social media, job boards, referrals, and professional networks.
* Introduce the StrongBodyAI platform and its benefits to prospective professionals.
* Guide candidates through registration, profile completion, and account activation.
* Follow up with candidates to ensure a smooth onboarding experience.

## Benefits

* Fully remote freelance position
* Flexible working hours
* Part-time or full-time collaboration
* Comprehensive onboarding training
* Recruitment resources and marketing materials
* Continuous support from the StrongBodyAI team

## Compensation

* Earn USD 40 for every professional who successfully completes onboarding and activates their membership.

## Qualifications

* Strong communication and networking skills
* Self-motivated and able to work independently
* Experience in recruitment, HR, talent acquisition, sales, or business development is preferred
* Existing connections within the healthcare or wellness in

title: Detailed 2D Modeling in Blender/AutoCAD
desc:
I need a straightforward solution that listens to recorded or live lectures and turns everything that is said into clean, readable text. Accuracy matters more to me than real-time speed, but the final transcript should be well-punctuated and ready for immediate use in hand-outs or slides.

You are free to build this in the language or framework you prefer—Python with Whisper, Google Speech-to-Text, AWS Transcribe, or any engine you feel delivers the highest word-for-word precision for lecture-style audio. I will be providing sample recordings so we can fine-tune against typical classroom background noise and different speaker accents.

Deliverables
• A runnable script or small desktop/app package that accepts an audio or video file and outputs a full transcript  
• Simple setup instructions plus a short README so I can install and run it on my own machine  
• One test run on a sample lecture showing the achieved accuracy and any post-processing you perform (punctuation, paragraphing, timestamps if available)  

If this sounds like your wheelhouse, tell me the engine you’d pick and why, plus a realistic turnaround for the first working draft.

title: Batch Edit Google Earth Placemarks
desc: I need to batch edit placemarks in a Google Earth file (.kml), modifying one or more style elements without changing others. The elements are icon size and color, text size and color. Selection would be by icon type or folder. The solution preferably would work within Google Earth but a standalone workflow would be suitable if necessary.

title: RPEQ CERTIFIED DESIGN FOR A REINFORCED CONCRETE SWIMMING POOL -- 2
desc:
BIDDERS - IMPORTANT NOTES

BIDS MUST INCLUDE ALLOWANCE FOR THE PROVISION OF  CERTIFICATION OF THE BIDDER’S DESIGN BY A REGISTERED PROFESSIONAL ENGINEER OF QUEENSLAND (RPEQ) AS A MANDATORY PART OF THIS PROJECT.

RPEQ REGISTRATION DETAILS (Name and 5-digit registration number) ARE TO BE PROVIDED INITIALLY BY THE BIDDER AS A MADATORY PART OF THEIR BID.

ONLY “VERIFIED IDENTITY FREELANCERS” SHOULD BID. BIDS MADE THAT DO NOT FACTOR IN THE ABOVE NOTED INFORMATION WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED AND WILL AUTOMATICALLY BE DISQUALIFIED FOR CONSIDERATION.  

This project has been posted multiple times after being withdrawn on the same number of occasions because in each case, bidders have either not been qualified or, have provided misleading information about their ability to properly undertake the project and /or their qualifications or credentials. If in doubt of our requirements then please do NOT bid. 



DETAILS: 

We require a RPEQ certified Design for a very simple, rectangular, reinforced concrete swimming pool utilizing the RISE WALL - LAY-FLAT Water Resistant Formwork System. All information and design manuals related to this formwork system are attached herewith. The design is for a reinforced concrete, above ground, free standing, rectangular swimming pool which MUST utilize the Rise Wall Lay-Flat Water-Resistant formwork system as the primary method of forming the pool. Preference will be given to an engineer experienced with both the Rise Wall Lay-Flat formwork system as well as

title: 2D Cafe Layout & Interiors
desc:
I’m ready to turn my café concept into a clear 2-dimensional plan and need your design expertise to do it. The project covers every public-facing zone—seating, counter/bar, and a small outdoor area—so the final drawings should flow seamlessly from one space to the next.  

The palette is already set: neutral whites, greys, and beiges will anchor the look. Beyond that, I’m open to your creative interpretation of furniture placement, circulation paths, and focal points that encourage customers to linger.  

Deliverables  
• Scaled 2D floor plan showing seating, counter/bar, and outdoor layouts  
• Furniture and fixture schedule with dimensions  
• Color call-outs and material notes that align with the specified neutral scheme  
• High-resolution PDF (and original editable file) suitable for contractors or a 3D hand-off later  

I’ll supply the room measurements and any utility locations the moment we get started, and I’m happy to answer clarifying questions along the way. Looking forward to seeing how you bring this space to life on paper.

title: Direct Serious Dramatic Short Film
desc:
I’m ready to move a dramatic short from script to screen and I need a director who can capture a serious, intense atmosphere throughout the entire production. The piece runs roughly 12 – 15 minutes and is dialogue-driven with a tight emotional arc, so your eye for performance and pacing will be critical.  

During pre-production we’ll refine the storyboard, shot list and blocking together. I already have a draft storyboard, location options and casting underway; your creative input on camera movement, lighting schemes and overall visual language will shape the final look. Principal photography is planned for a three-day shoot on location in a single house interior and one exterior night scene. You’ll lead the crew on set, work closely with the DP, ensure performances stay grounded, and make real-time adjustments that heighten tension without resorting to melodrama.

After we wrap, I’ll handle post-production myself but I’d like you available for two review sessions to provide notes on the rough and fine cuts so we preserve the tonal consistency you establish on set.

Key deliverables
• Annotated shot list & final blocking plan before day one of shooting  
• On-set direction across all shooting days, supervising cast and crew  
• Two rounds of edit feedback (remote is fine)  

Experience with drama, low-light setups, and intimate character pieces is a plus. If stories that leave audiences holding their breath excite you, I’d love to see your reel and talk scheduling.

title: Hindi Educational Script Creation
desc:
I need a clear, engaging educational script written entirely in Hindi that can work across school and college classrooms as well as serve teachers preparing lessons. Because the material must resonate with such a broad audience, the writing should balance simplicity for younger learners with enough depth to satisfy older students and educators.  

What I expect: one complete, ready-to-use script that introduces the chosen Hindi topic, builds concept understanding step-by-step, and closes with a concise recap or activity prompt. A conversational flow, relatable examples and smooth transitions are essential so the content can be delivered as-is for video, audio or live teaching.  

If you have experience crafting Hindi learning material and can keep the language lively yet accurate, I look forward to seeing your approach and estimated turnaround time.
